channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dallas' Naji Marshall gets 4-game suspension, Phoenix's Jusuf Nurkic is banned 3 games for fight
item.description: The NBA suspended Dallas Mavericks forward Naji Marshall for four games and Phoenix Suns center Jusuf Nurkic for three games for their roles in an on-court fight during Friday night's game. Dallas forward P.J. Washington was suspended one game. The suspensions handed down Saturday are without pay.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Notre Dame's Danny Nelson scores twice, defending champ US beats Latvia 5-1 in world junior hockey
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Notre Dame forward Danny Nelson scored twice, Western Michigan’s Hampton Slukynsky made 25 saves and the defending champion United States beat Latvia 5-1 on Saturday in the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 18 Iowa State wins 11 games for 1st time, tops No. 15 Miami 42-41 in Pop-Tarts Bowl
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Rocco Becht scored from a yard out on fourth-and-goal with 56 seconds remaining and No. 18 Iowa State capped the best season in school history by rallying past No. 15 Miami 42-41 in the Pop-Tarts Bowl on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colts QB Anthony Richardson ruled out for Sunday's game against the Giants
item.description: Indianapolis quarterback Anthony Richardson has been ruled out for the Colts’ big game at the New York Giants on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Miami's Cam Ward sets NCAA's Division I record with 156th career touchdown pass
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Cam Ward made NCAA history in his final college game. The Miami quarterback threw a record-setting 156th touchdown pass of his college career Saturday, connecting with Jacolby George for a 4-yard score with 4:12 left in the first quarter of the Pop-Tarts Bowl against Iowa State.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rickey Henderson’s daughter addresses reports of false funeral service
item.description: Henderson's daughter, Alexis, confirmed that there will not be a funeral service at the Paramount Theatre on Sunday
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Dodgers' Ohtani and wife will soon be welcoming a baby to the family
item.description: Between a marriage announcement, third MVP award and World Series title, Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani had a pretty good 2024. And now, it looks like 2025 may be even better for the Japanese two-way baseball phenom.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Victor Wembanyama plays 1-on-1 chess with fans in New York
item.description: Victor Wembanyama went to a park in New York City and played 1-on-1 with fans on Saturday. He even lost a couple of games. Not in basketball, though. Wemby was playing chess. And this wasn't on a whim: He knows how to play and even brought his own chess set.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Patriots QB Drake Maye returns to game after evaluation for head injury vs. Chargers
item.description: Patriots rookie quarterback Drake Maye has returned to the game after being evaluated for a head injury following a blow to the helmet in the first quarter of New England’s matchup with the Los Angeles Chargers.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval to resign after heading team's unpopular move to Las Vegas
item.description: Athletics president Dave Kaval is resigning from his position after eight years. Kaval was the public face of the team's move from Oakland to Las Vegas..
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lehkonen gets hat trick as Colorado beats Utah, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's struggles on its home ice continue. Artturi Lehkonen scored his first NHL hat trick, and the Colorado Avalanche won 4-1 against the Utah Hockey Club at Delta Center in Salt Lake City on Friday. Utah lost all three games on this current homestand.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kings fire coach Mike Brown less than halfway through his 3rd season
item.description: The Sacramento Kings have fired coach Mike Brown less than halfway through his third season with the team mired in a five-game losing streak. General manager Monte McNair called the move Friday a “difficult decision” and thanked Brown for his work.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2 sailor deaths result in muted celebrations on winning yacht in Sydney to Hobart race
item.description: Champagne corks often pop and loud, boisterous cheers are usually heard around Constitution Dock when the Sydney to Hobart line honors winner finishes in the Tasmanian state capital.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS PASSA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA star Jimmy Butler to remain sidelined due to illness, according to Heat
item.description: Jimmy Butler has become synonymous with Heat basketball over his six seasons in Miami, but an illness has kept the star off the court several days.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Miami basketball coach Jim Larrañaga left 'exhausted' by NIL's impact on college sports
item.description: The longtime Hurricanes coach said his decision to abruptly step down from his position was partly due to his lack of interest in contending with NIL.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler has surgery after injuring hand with broken glass, will miss first signature event of 2025
item.description: Scottie Scheffler's manager announced Friday the world's No. 1 player will miss The Sentry next week after injuring his hand with broken glass, requiring surgery.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Ahead of 2025, WWE Champion Cody Rhodes talks balancing fatherhood and wrestling's biggest stage
item.description: Heading into 2025, Cody Rhodes reflects on his epic year and sets new goals for fatherhood and WrestleMania 41 in Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, Fox 5

item.title: Meet the Americans who dominated the 2024 Paris Olympics
item.description: This past year was filled with champions galore as Team USA showed up in Paris for the 2024 Games prepared for total domination. Nearly 600 U.S. athletes competed to bring home 126 medals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls blow 21 point lead in 141-133 loss to Atlanta
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jalen Johnson had a career-high 30 points and the Atlanta Hawks rallied from a late 21-point deficit by scoring 50 points in the fourth quarter in a 141-133 win over the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Bears vs Seahawks Preview: Inactives, Caleb Williams' development and a shot at the wrong kind of history
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — For the last time this season, the Chicago Bears will take to Soldier Field with a bit of dubious history on the line. The Bears (4-11) are losers of nine straight and will take on a Seattle Seahawks squad (8-7) who's playoff hopes dangle in the balance.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mahomes throws 3 TDs as Chiefs clinch AFC's top seed by breezing past the skidding Steelers 29-10
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Andy Reid donned a Santa Claus suit in a giddy Kansas City Chiefs locker room on Christmas Day, then handed his team a present it increasingly looks like it deserves: home-field advantage throughout the AFC playoffs.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BYU arrives in San Antonio ahead of Alamo Bowl
item.description: SAN ANTONIO, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The Cougars have arrived in San Antonio for what they hope will be an Alamo Bowl to remember. "Super excited to be down here," said defensive end Tyler Batty.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Winter Classic Recap: Six local teams finish 2-1
item.description: Now that school is out for Christmas break and high school basketball is on a hiatus until early 2025, let's recap a great weekend of hoops across the Grand Valley.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Houston Texans wide receiver Tank Dell released from hospital after severe knee injury
item.description: It’s the second straight year Tank Dell has sustained what is almost certain to be a season-ending injury.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jared Goff throws 3 TD passes as Lions beat Bears 34-17 for franchise-record 13th win
item.description: Jared Goff and the Detroit Lions locked in from the start and delivered a bounce-back performance. It came with a few team records, too.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: College Football Playoffs looks for good matchups after snoozy first round of blowouts
item.description: For those who dozed through it, or flipped to more compelling fare in the NFL, here's a brief recap of the rollout of the much-anticipated College Football Playoff. Average final score: Winners 36, Losers 17.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, WGN 9
